title: Create: Rubberworks
description: Replace dried kelp in Create with a tidy rubber factory
body:
This addon removes dried kelp from Create's recipes and replaces it with rubber and introduces two new machines for it's production:

The Sapper - extract resin and other fluids from trees.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![sapper](https://images-ext-1.discordapp.net/external/puB-U1lW5F82SOYKmNHdy5ELuQyCOT4aopPvNZzgvSQ/https/media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1425758/description_d7e4539c-be1a-472c-ad78-5244adfea4c0.png?format=webp&quality=lossless&width=639&height=452)


</details>


The Compressor - process resin into rubber aswell as other fluids.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![compressor](https://images-ext-1.discordapp.net/external/ibnplOE3qNapGZ4a6QW5XJ89Cent6V-7SawP6c-jHWI/https/media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1425758/description_ca67d7db-9f0e-4e5a-b9b3-7357d7bdbcdb.png?format=webp&quality=lossless&width=553&height=452)

</details>





Modpack developers are free to use this in any modpack.

This mod has built-in KubeJS support, demonstrated here:


```
 event.recipes.rubberworksSapping(Fluid.of("minecraft:milk", 40), ["minecraft:oak_log", "minecraft:oak_leaves"])
```
```
event.recipes.rubberworksCompressing(Item.of("minecraft:diamond", 2), Fluid.of("minecraft:water", 500)).heated()
```
